hero.description: FluxBless curates premium accessories reflecting classic Eastern aesthetics. We specialize in ancient colored glaze, natural agate, selected cinnabar, and white jade to bring harmony, elegance, and inner peace to your daily life.

product.sizingDesc: Our bracelets feature slight elasticity, fitting most wrist sizes (14cm-18cm). For custom sizing, please contact customer support.
product.authenticityDesc: All items are genuine natural gemstones, professionally authenticated for quality and purity.
product.blessingDesc: Every item is carefully selected and hand-cleaned before shipping to ensure pure quality.
product.shippingDesc: Free shipping on orders over $29. Carefully packaged, safely delivered.

checkout.title: Secure Checkout
checkout.error: Failed to initialize payment. Please try again.

success.title: Order Placed Successfully! Thank you for your order.
success.message1: Your payment was successful and your order is confirmed. We are preparing your items.
success.message2: We will package and ship your items as soon as possible. Your order receipt and tracking details will be sent to your email.
success.blessing: Thank you for shopping with us. Wish you health, happiness, and peace always!
